content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09D","process_rule":"1. Copy all relevant rows from the decision table into a temporary table `J09D_temp`, but only for rows where the tour identifier starts with `"J09D"`.

2. In table `J09D_temp`, add a new column `ENTSCHEIDUNG`.

3. In `J09D_temp`, classify meter reading type by filling `ENTSCHEIDUNG` using these rules in the given order (later rules overwrite earlier values where conditions apply):
   - 3.1 For each `HAUS`, if it has fewer than 3 `EQUNR`, set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "KSA"`, else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "EVU"`.
   - 3.2 For all rows with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0`, set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "EVU"`.
   - 3.3 For all rows with `HOUSE_NUM1` in the range 500–599 (inclusive), set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "EVU"`.
   - 3.4 For all rows with `HOUSE_NUM1` in the range 900–999 (inclusive), set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "EVU"`.

4. Join `J09D_temp` with table `EABLG` using the column `INSTALLATION`, and extend `J09D_temp` with the joined data.

5. Join `J09D_temp` with tables `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER` using the column `EQUNR` (JOIN table with `NET_MASTER` and `SALES_MASTER` using `EQUNR`), and extend `J09D_temp` with the respective customer data fields from both tables.

6. For each row in `J09D_temp`, compare the customer data coming from `SALES_MASTER` and from `NET_MASTER` (e.g., name, address, email) to determine which source is available for that row.

7. If-else selection of customer data source for each row:
   - If the corresponding sales customer data for the row is not empty:
     - 7.1 Use the `SALES_MASTER` customer data entries as the authoritative customer data source for that row, and populate the final customer-related columns in `J09D_temp` from `SALES_MASTER`.
   - Else:
     - 7.2 Use the `NET_MASTER` customer data entries as the authoritative customer data source for that row, and populate the final customer-related columns in `J09D_temp` from `NET_MASTER`.

8. Export the final contents of `J09D_temp` as a CSV file named `J09D` (e.g., `J09D.csv`).  
   Ensure the CSV contains exactly these columns, in this naming form:  
   `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

9. Send an email to the EVU with the exported CSV file attached, using:  
   - Recipient email address: `meter.readings@evu.com`  
   - Attachment file path: `file_path: <path_to_exported_csv_file>` (replace `<path_to_exported_csv_file>` with the actual path to the exported `J09D` CSV file).

10. Delete the temporary table `J09D_temp` (and any other explicitly created temporary tables used only for this process), thereby cleaning up after the export and email have been completed."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Copy all relevant rows from the decision table into a temporary table `J09D_temp`, but only for rows where the tour identifier starts with `"J09D"`.

2. In table `J09D_temp`, add a new column `ENTSCHEIDUNG`.

3. In `J09D_temp`, classify meter reading type by filling `ENTSCHEIDUNG` using these rules in the given order (later rules overwrite earlier values where conditions apply):
   - 3.1 For each `HAUS`, if it has fewer than 3 `EQUNR`, set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "KSA"`, else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "EVU"`.
   - 3.2 For all rows with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0`, set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "EVU"`.
   - 3.3 For all rows with `HOUSE_NUM1` in the range 500–599 (inclusive), set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "EVU"`.
   - 3.4 For all rows with `HOUSE_NUM1` in the range 900–999 (inclusive), set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "EVU"`.

4. Join `J09D_temp` with table `EABLG` using the column `INSTALLATION`, and extend `J09D_temp` with the joined data.

5. Join `J09D_temp` with tables `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER` using the column `EQUNR` (JOIN table with `NET_MASTER` and `SALES_MASTER` using `EQUNR`), and extend `J09D_temp` with the respective customer data fields from both tables.

6. For each row in `J09D_temp`, compare the customer data coming from `SALES_MASTER` and from `NET_MASTER` (e.g., name, address, email) to determine which source is available for that row.

7. If-else selection of customer data source for each row:
   - If the corresponding sales customer data for the row is not empty:
     - 7.1 Use the `SALES_MASTER` customer data entries as the authoritative customer data source for that row, and populate the final customer-related columns in `J09D_temp` from `SALES_MASTER`.
   - Else:
     - 7.2 Use the `NET_MASTER` customer data entries as the authoritative customer data source for that row, and populate the final customer-related columns in `J09D_temp` from `NET_MASTER`.

8. Export the final contents of `J09D_temp` as a CSV file named `J09D` (e.g., `J09D.csv`).  
   Ensure the CSV contains exactly these columns, in this naming form:  
   `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

9. Send an email to the EVU with the exported CSV file attached, using:  
   - Recipient email address: `meter.readings@evu.com`  
   - Attachment file path: `file_path: <path_to_exported_csv_file>` (replace `<path_to_exported_csv_file>` with the actual path to the exported `J09D` CSV file).

10. Delete the temporary table `J09D_temp` (and any other explicitly created temporary tables used only for this process), thereby cleaning up after the export and email have been completed.

# Table: eabl

Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number

MR category (TEXT) Meter reading category

# Table: eablg

Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number

# Table: eanl

# Table: process_rules
## column_name (type) description
process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_temp;

CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS
SELECT 
  d.HAUS,
  d.ANLAGE,
  d.ME_MA_ID,
  d.EQUNR,
  d.HOUSE_NUM1,
  d.POST_CODE1,
  d.CITY1,
  d.CITY2,
  d.TOUR,
  e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  e."Geplante Ableseart",
  e."MR type",
  e."MR TYPE TEXT",
  e."MR category",
  e.ISTABLART_TXT,
  e.LOGIKZW,
  e.KENNZIFF,
  e."Record created on" AS e_record_created_on,
  e."Object changed on" AS e_object_changed_on,
  g."Installation" AS g_installation,
  g."Meter Reading reason" AS g_mr_reason,
  g."MR Reason - Text" AS g_mr_reason_text,
  g."Scheduled MR Date" AS g_scheduled_mr_date,
  g."Meter Reading unit" AS g_mr_unit,
  g."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No..1" AS g_mr_doc_no_1
FROM decision_table d
LEFT JOIN eabl e ON d.EQUNR = e.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN eablg g ON d.ANLAGE = g.Installation
WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09D%';
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_temp;

CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS
SELECT *
FROM decision_table
WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09D%';
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;

UPDATE J09D_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
  WHEN HAUS IN (
    SELECT HAUS FROM J09D_temp
    GROUP BY HAUS
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3
  ) THEN 'KSA'
  ELSE 'EVU'
END;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN Installation TEXT;

UPDATE J09D_temp
SET Installation = ANLAGE;

CREATE TEMP TABLE tmp_eablg AS
SELECT * FROM eablg;

UPDATE J09D_temp
SET "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = (
  SELECT e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."
  FROM eablg e
  WHERE e.Installation = J09D_temp.ANLAGE
  LIMIT 1
);

ALTER TABLE J09D_temp
ADD COLUMN SALES_TITLE TEXT,
ADD COLUMN SALES_FORENAME TEXT,
ADD COLUMN SALES_SURNAME TEXT,
ADD COLUMN SALES_STREET TEXT,
ADD COLUMN SALES_STREETNO TEXT,
ADD COLUMN SALES_POST_CODE1 INTEGER,
ADD COLUMN SALES_CITY1 TEXT,
ADD COLUMN SALES_CITY2 TEXT,
ADD COLUMN SALES_EMAIL TEXT;
PRAGMA table_info(J09D_temp);
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_TITLE TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_FORENAME TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_SURNAME TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_STREET TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_STREETNO TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_POST_CODE1 INTEGER;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_CITY1 TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_CITY2 TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_EMAIL TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN NET_TITLE TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN NET_FORENAME TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN NET_SURNAME TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN NET_STREET TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN NET_STREETNO TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN NET_POST_CODE1 INTEGER;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN NET_CITY1 TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN NET_CITY2 TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN NET_EMAIL TEXT;

UPDATE J09D_temp
SET SALES_TITLE = s.TITLE,
    SALES_FORENAME = s.FORENAME,
    SALES_SURNAME = s.SURNAME,
    SALES_STREET = s.STREET,
    SALES_STREETNO = s.STREETNO,
    SALES_POST_CODE1 = s.POST_CODE1,
    SALES_CITY1 = s.CITY1,
    SALES_CITY2 = s.CITY2,
    SALES_EMAIL = s.EMAIL
FROM sales_master s
WHERE s.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR;

UPDATE J09D_temp
SET NET_TITLE = n.TITLE,
    NET_FORENAME = n.FORENAME,
    NET_SURNAME = n.SURNAME,
    NET_STREET = n.STREET,
    NET_STREETNO = n.STREETNO,
    NET_POST_CODE1 = n.POST_CODE1,
    NET_CITY1 = n.CITY1,
    NET_CITY2 = n.CITY2,
    NET_EMAIL = n.EMAIL
FROM net_master n
WHERE n.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN TITLE TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN FORENAME TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN SURNAME TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN STREET TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN STREETNO TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN POST_CODE1_FINAL INTEGER;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN CITY1_FINAL TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN CITY2_FINAL TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN EMAIL TEXT;

UPDATE J09D_temp
SET TITLE = CASE WHEN SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL AND SALES_TITLE <> '' THEN SALES_TITLE ELSE NET_TITLE END,
    FORENAME = CASE WHEN SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL AND SALES_FORENAME <> '' THEN SALES_FORENAME ELSE NET_FORENAME END,
    SURNAME = CASE WHEN SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL AND SALES_SURNAME <> '' THEN SALES_SURNAME ELSE NET_SURNAME END,
    STREET = CASE WHEN SALES_STREET IS NOT NULL AND SALES_STREET <> '' THEN SALES_STREET ELSE NET_STREET END,
    STREETNO = CASE WHEN SALES_STREETNO IS NOT NULL AND SALES_STREETNO <> '' THEN SALES_STREETNO ELSE NET_STREETNO END,
    POST_CODE1_FINAL = CASE WHEN SALES_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_POST_CODE1 ELSE NET_POST_CODE1 END,
    CITY1_FINAL = CASE WHEN SALES_CITY1 IS NOT NULL AND SALES_CITY1 <> '' THEN SALES_CITY1 ELSE NET_CITY1 END,
    CITY2_FINAL = CASE WHEN SALES_CITY2 IS NOT NULL AND SALES_CITY2 <> '' THEN SALES_CITY2 ELSE NET_CITY2 END,
    EMAIL = CASE WHEN SALES_EMAIL IS NOT NULL AND SALES_EMAIL <> '' THEN SALES_EMAIL ELSE NET_EMAIL END;

args.sql_query:
SELECT 
  "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  HAUS,
  ANLAGE,
  ME_MA_ID,
  EQUNR,
  HOUSE_NUM1,
  ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  TITLE,
  FORENAME,
  SURNAME,
  STREET,
  STREETNO,
  POST_CODE1_FINAL AS POST_CODE1,
  CITY1_FINAL AS CITY1,
  CITY2_FINAL AS CITY2,
  EMAIL
FROM J09D_temp;
